# MINT â€” June Completion Sprint
**Generated by:** Claude Orchestrator
**Date:** 25.06.2026
**Target:** Production-ready build. Zero P0/P1 issues. All checks green.

---

## BUILDER INSTRUCTIONS

Take ownership of this project end-to-end. Create subagents as needed, coordinate them, give each one a clear job, keep them focused, compare their answers, audit their answers, give them specialized skills as needed. Resolve disagreements and apply improvements and execute tasks as plans define directly. Verify the result and only stop for destructive, secret-related, paid, external-network, production, or irreversible actions. Keep going until the project is done or you hit a real blocker. Do not stop for small questions. Token-saving mode ON.

After each phase:
- Assign a subagent to update all documents to be on the same level as the work.
- After documents are updated, commit all changes and push them.

**Subagents must work in parallel. If no parallel work can be performed, you will be the one executing the task â€” not a subagent. Create subagents when they can work in parallel to increase speed.**

**Branch strategy:** Push each phase to its own branch: `phase1branch`, `phase2branch`, `phase3branch`, `phase4branch`. Do NOT merge to main. The orchestrator handles audit and merge control after all phases are complete.

> Run Phase 0 subagent and Phase 1 subagents in parallel where possible. Phase 1 can start test scaffolding while Phase 0 fixes compile errors, but tests must be run only after Phase 0 completes.

## PHASE 3 â€” RELIABILITY & SECURITY
**Branch: `phase3branch`**
> Subagents can split: one on JWT/auth (T084-T097), one on infrastructure (T098-T110), one on data persistence (T111-T121) â€” all in parallel.

### Replace Custom JWT with jsonwebtoken

- [ ] **T084** In `backend/`, run `npm install jsonwebtoken && npm install -D @types/jsonwebtoken`.
- [ ] **T085** Rewrite `backend/src/utils/jwt.ts`. Remove the custom base64/HMAC implementation. Use `jwt.sign(payload, secret, { expiresIn: '7d' })` and `jwt.verify(token, secret)` from the `jsonwebtoken` package.
- [ ] **T086** Update `backend/src/middleware/auth.ts` to use the new `jwt.ts` API.
- [ ] **T087** Update `backend/src/routes/auth.routes.ts` to use the new `jwt.ts` API.
- [ ] **T088** Run `npm run backend:build`. 0 TypeScript errors.
- [ ] **T089** Run `npm test`. Auth tests must pass.

### Real Magic Link Token Verification

- [ ] **T090** In `backend/prisma/schema.prisma`, add `magicLinkToken String?` and `magicLinkExpires DateTime?` to the `User` model. Run migration `npx prisma migrate dev --name add-magic-link-fields`.
- [ ] **T091** In `backend/src/routes/auth.routes.ts` magic-link handler: generate a cryptographically random token (`crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex')`), store it on the user with expiry of 15 minutes, return only `{ sent: true, email }` (never return the token to the client â€” in dev, log it to console).
- [ ] **T092** In the `verify` handler: look up user by email, check `magicLinkToken === submittedToken` AND `magicLinkExpires > now()`. If valid, clear the token fields and issue JWT. If invalid/expired, return `401`.
- [ ] **T093** Run `npm test`. Auth integration tests must pass with real token verification.

### Input Sanitization (XSS Prevention)

- [ ] **T094** In `backend/`, run `npm install isomorphic-dompurify`.
- [ ] **T095** Create `backend/src/utils/sanitize.ts` exporting `sanitize(input: string): string` that runs `DOMPurify.sanitize(input, { ALLOWED_TAGS: [] })` (strips all HTML, plain text only).
- [ ] **T096** In `backend/src/services/library.service.ts`, wrap `content`, `title`, `description` fields with `sanitize()` before any DB write.
- [ ] **T097** In `backend/src/services/project.service.ts`, wrap `name`, `description` fields.
- [ ] **T098** In `backend/src/services/research.service.ts`, wrap `summary`, `title`, `content` fields.
- [ ] **T099** Run `npm test`. Tests must still pass.

### Graceful Shutdown

- [ ] **T100** In `backend/src/index.ts`, add handlers for `process.on('SIGTERM', ...)` and `process.on('SIGINT', ...)` that call `app.close()`, then `await prisma.$disconnect()`, then `process.exit(0)`.
- [ ] **T101** Log the shutdown event with `app.log.info('Graceful shutdown initiated')` before closing.
- [ ] **T102** Run `npm run backend:build`. 0 errors.

### Actual Token Counting in Cost Tracker

- [ ] **T103** In `backend/src/services/ai/openai-compatible.ts`, extract token usage from the API response body (`response.usage.prompt_tokens`, `response.usage.completion_tokens`).
- [ ] **T104** In `backend/src/services/ai/ollama.ts`, extract `eval_count` and `prompt_eval_count` from Ollama response.
- [ ] **T105** Update all `logAiUsage(...)` calls to pass the actual token counts, not estimates.
- [ ] **T106** Run `npm test`.

### Image Upload Persistence

- [ ] **T107** Create `backend/src/services/storage.service.ts`. Export `saveImage(base64: string, filename: string): Promise<string>` that writes to `backend/uploads/` and returns the relative URL `/uploads/filename`.
- [ ] **T108** In `backend/src/index.ts`, register `@fastify/static` (install if not present) to serve the `uploads/` directory at `/uploads`.
- [ ] **T109** In `backend/src/routes/studio.routes.ts`, after generating an image, call `saveImage(...)` and return the `/uploads/...` URL instead of the ephemeral ComfyUI URL.
- [ ] **T110** Add `backend/uploads/.gitkeep` and add `backend/uploads/*.png` to `.gitignore`.

### Content Versioning

- [ ] **T111** In `backend/prisma/schema.prisma`, add the `ContentVersion` model:
  ```
  model ContentVersion {
    id        String   @id @default(cuid())
    postId    String
    content   String
    createdAt DateTime @default(now())
    post      GeneratedPost @relation(fields: [postId], references: [id])
  }
  ```
  Add `versions ContentVersion[]` to `GeneratedPost`. Run migration `npx prisma migrate dev --name add-content-version`.
- [ ] **T112** Create `backend/src/services/version.service.ts`. Export `createVersion(postId, content)` and `listVersions(postId)` and `restoreVersion(postId, versionId)`.
- [ ] **T113** Create `backend/src/routes/version.routes.ts`. Register: `GET /library/:id/versions`, `POST /library/:id/restore/:versionId`.
- [ ] **T114** In `library.service.ts` `updatePost`, automatically call `createVersion(id, oldContent)` before updating.
- [ ] **T115** Register version routes in `backend/src/index.ts`.
- [ ] **T116** In `frontend/src/pages/Library.tsx`, add a "Version History" button in the detail panel. Show a list of versions with timestamps. Add "Restore" per version.
- [ ] **T117** Run `npm run build && npm test`.
- [ ] **T118** Commit all Phase 3 work with message `feat: Phase 3 â€” JWT, magic link tokens, XSS sanitization, graceful shutdown, token counting, image storage, versioning` and push to `phase3branch`.

## DONE STATE CRITERIA

The project is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] `npm run lint` â€” 0 errors, 0 warnings
- [ ] `npm test` â€” all tests pass, 80%+ coverage
- [ ] `npm run build` â€” succeeds with 0 TypeScript errors
- [ ] `npm run e2e` â€” all E2E specs pass
- [ ] No `any` types in any non-test file
- [ ] No `console.log` / `console.error` in production code
- [ ] All P0 and P1 issues from audit resolved
- [ ] All 4 phase branches pushed and ready for orchestrator merge review
- [ ] All docs (GROUND_TRUTH, KANBAN, TODO, ARCHITECTURE) updated to match reality
- [ ] Each phase has been committed and pushed to its own branch
